headline: Is Public Service Enterprise Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: While Public Service Enterprise Group has not kept pace with the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, its recent gains have been stronger comparatively, with analysts still moderately upbeat on the stock’s growth prospects.

headline: Utilities Trade Focus On Quarterly Results For Long-Term Outlooks
summary: As data center development fuels an unprecedented wave of large-load customer contracts, US electric utilities are emphasizing long-term spending and growth visibility. Read more here.
